== Notes for [[Item:Q104631|Q104631]] ==

11. FRANCISCA3 DE MORALES-TREVINO (JUANA2 DE TREVINO-QUINTANILLA-Y-SALAZAR, PEDRO1 DE SALAZAR)
*was born 1641.
*She married PEDRO DE-LOS-SANTOS-COY-Y-DE-LA-CERDA,
**son of BERNARDO DE-LOS-SANTOS-COY and MARIA-INES DE-LA-CERDA-Y-CASTRO. He was born 1640.
***Marriage Notes for FRANCISCA DE MORALES-TREVINO and PEDRO DE-LOS-SANTOS-COY-Y-DE-LA-CERDA: Marriage source:Origen de los Fundadores de Texas, Nuevo Mexico, Coahulia, y Nuevo Leon, by Guillermo Garmendia Leal. (page 76).

Children of FRANCISCA DE MORALES-TREVINO and PEDRO DE-LOS-SANTOS-COY-Y-DE-LA-CERDA are:
*1. 47. i. JOSEPH4 DE-LOS-SANTOS-COY-MORALES.
*2. 48. ii. MARIA-INES DE-LOS-SANTOS-COY-MORALES.
*3. 49. iii. PEDRO DE-LOS-SANTOS-COY-MORALES,
**b. Abt. 1662, Saltillo, Coahuila, Mexico;
**d. Boca de Leones, Nuevo Leon, Mexico?.
*4. 50. iv. CAPTAIN LAZARO DE-LOS-SANTOS-COY-MORALES,
**d. 1717.
*5. 51. v. ISABEL DE-LOS-SANTOS-COY-MORALES.

http://www.somosprimos.com/inclan/salazar.htm
--------------------
=== GEDCOM Note ===
_CRE DATE 30 SEP 2016 TIME 13:28:00

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000007465424145

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
